title: Toor Dal Fry
description: A comforting South Indian dish made with toor dal and spices. This recipe is a staple in many eastern households.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add onion, ginger, and garlic. Saute until the onion is translucent.
Add chili pepper and saute for another minute.
Add toor dal, turmeric powder, and salt. Mix well.
Add 2 cups of water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and let the dal simmer for 20-25 minutes or until it's cooked.
Check the seasoning and adjust as needed.
Serve hot with rice or roti.
